mapper.select: select id, dept_id, username, nickname, user_type, avatar, password, status, del_flag from sys_user where username = #{username} or phone = #{username} or email = #{username}

select dept_id, username, nickname, real_name, if(user_type = 0, '系统管理员', '系统用户') as user_type, email, phone, case sex when 0 then '男' when 1 then '女' when 2 then '未知' end as sex, avatar, create_time from sys_user where id = #{id}

select u.username, u.nickname, r.role_name, u.real_name, if(u.user_type = 0, '系统管理员', '系统用户') as user_type, u.avatar, u.phone, case when u.sex = 0 then '男' when u.sex = 1 then '女' else '未知' end as sex, u.email, if(u.status = 0, '正常', '停用') as status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.del_flag = 0
and u.username like concat('%', #{query.username}, '%')
and u.phone like concat('%', #{query.phone}, '%')
and u.email like concat('%', #{query.email}, '%')
and u.status = #{query.status}
order by u.create_time desc
